text: Shutter direction. Specifies the direction that the shutter sweeps. The default, down, is the most common direction for rolling shutters. Note that this parameter currently only works with RIS and

Exposure duration. Zero means an ideal rolling shutter where each line is exposed instantaneously when read. The default, one, is equivalent to a global shutter where all lines are exposed and read at the same time. Note that this parameter currently only works with RIS and
